## 🔬 Deep Research
**Company Name:** Cyber Security Services (CSS)

**Website URL:** Not provided in the extracted data.

**What They Do:**  
CSS provides penetration testing, virtual CISO (vCISO), incident response, 24/7 Security Operations Center (SOC), risk assessments, and cybersecurity consulting. They help organizations identify security gaps, improve compliance readiness, and protect critical systems. They were an original contributor to the NIST Cybersecurity Framework.

**Mentioned Compliance Frameworks:**  
- ✅ SOC 2  
- ✅ PCI DSS  
- ✅ HIPAA  
- ❌ FedRAMP (not mentioned)  
- ✅ ISO 27001 (mentioned in [CONTACT] page as part of risk assessment & compliance services)
